offer: For restaurant kitchen managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate inventory tracking causes over-ordering and waste. We automate inventory usage reconciliation instead of manual inventory tracking and reconciliation.
problem: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to over-ordering and waste.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for kitchen managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to restaurant kitchen managers with demos
Engage in community forums for kitchen managers
try_it: Let users try manual entry of inventory on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
